title: TeamSheet
description: Canonical match-day team sheet for one side of a match.

formation.description: Kickoff or current formation label when known.

captainPlayerId.description: Convenience reference for the team's captain.

starters.description: Starting XI or available starter list.

unavailable.description: Optional broader squad members who are unavailable or outside the named bench.

sourceMeta.description: Provider-scoped metadata bag for provenance and advanced debugging. It must stay JSON-serializable, must not duplicate canonical top-level fields, and must not reinterpret raw provider semantics into fake cross-provider meaning.
